Container interface ============== This repository holds all interfaces related to [PSR-11 (Container Interface)][psr-url]. Note that this is not a Container implementation of its own. It is merely abstractions that describe the components of a Dependency Injection Container. The installable [package][package-url] and [implementations][implementation-url] are listed on Packagist. [psr-url]: https://www.php-fig.org/psr/psr-11/ [package-url]: https://packagist.org/packages/psr/container [implementation-url]: https://packagist.org/providers/psr/container-implementation
